title: The Art and Science of Choosing: Understanding Decision Making

questions.sentence: Psychologists Daniel Kahneman and Amos Tversky introduced the concept of two primary systems of thinking
System 1 is fast intuitive and emotional
System 2 on the other hand is slower more deliberate and logical
One of the most significant discoveries in decision psychology is the prevalence of cognitive biases
Emotions also play a crucial often underestimated role
Understanding these psychological mechanisms is the first step towards making better decisions
